item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)
きんキラキラキラ金曜日なん🫓
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#おはようございます
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
item.content:encoded:

今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)

item.title: Mexico City has already seen one game delayed due lightning …
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Mexico City has already seen one game delayed due lightning strikes in the vicinity of the Estadio Azteca. on.wsj.com/4aw1mg7
item.content:encoded: Mexico City has already seen one game delayed due lightning strikes in the vicinity of the Estadio Azteca. on.wsj.com/4aw1mg7

item.title: ‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤 ‎ ‎ワシは… ‎アメリカ時間に ‎起きてる必要がある ‎ ‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎

item.title: 『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳 早川書房）を御紹介します。 n…
item.author: Katz@PanTraductia (@katzptd.bsky.social)
item.description:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。
item.content:encoded:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。

item.title: お客様が素敵な時計つけてたから 時計素敵ですね☺️って話したら わかる？って言われたから 「◯◯でしょ☺️綺麗だよね☺️…
item.author: やまだいおり🐮とうぱに新宿御苑 (@panicyamada.bsky.social)
item.description:
お客様が素敵な時計つけてたから
時計素敵ですね☺️って話したら
わかる？って言われたから
「◯◯でしょ☺️綺麗だよね☺️男の人が綺麗な時計つけてるの大好き☺️私もアクセサリー欲しいんだよね☺️絶対貴重品ポーチに入れた方がいいよ☺️」ってずっと話して

本指名のお客さんもたくさんでしょ！わかる気がする！って言われたから
「うっかり時計あげたくなった？☺️」っていったら

😅💦って顔してて可愛かった
item.content:encoded:
お客様が素敵な時計つけてたから
時計素敵ですね☺️って話したら
わかる？って言われたから
「◯◯でしょ☺️綺麗だよね☺️男の人が綺麗な時計つけてるの大好き☺️私もアクセサリー欲しいんだよね☺️絶対貴重品ポーチに入れた方がいいよ☺️」ってずっと話して

本指名のお客さんもたくさんでしょ！わかる気がする！って言われたから
「うっかり時計あげたくなった？☺️」っていったら

😅💦って顔してて可愛かった

item.title: Any large earthquake can be dangerous, but the residents of …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Any large earthquake can be dangerous, but the residents of Caracas and Venezuelan coastal cities like La Guaira and Catia La Mar were victims of several unlucky factors. Here's what made last month's earthquakes there so deadly. trib.al/mwtWlQ3
item.content:encoded: Any large earthquake can be dangerous, but the residents of Caracas and Venezuelan coastal cities like La Guaira and Catia La Mar were victims of several unlucky factors. Here's what made last month's earthquakes there so deadly. trib.al/mwtWlQ3

item.title: In a new #SciencePolicyForum, Johns Hopkins University Presi…
item.author: Science Magazine (@science.org)
item.description: In a new #SciencePolicyForum, Johns Hopkins University President Ronald Daniels discusses the role of universities in U.S. research, arguing that much of the modern American research enterprise can trace its roots to the late 19th century transformation of these institutions. https://scim.ag/4ve6pcC
item.content:encoded: In a new #SciencePolicyForum, Johns Hopkins University President Ronald Daniels discusses the role of universities in U.S. research, arguing that much of the modern American research enterprise can trace its roots to the late 19th century transformation of these institutions. https://scim.ag/4ve6pcC

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and …
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. is blessed with one of the most scientifically and technologically advanced health care systems in the world.

And yet, when it comes to health outcomes among the world’s wealthiest countries, the U.S. ranks last.

Read "Sick in a Hospital Town," a 5-part series:

item.title: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los fu…
item.author: Fonsi Loaiza (@fonsiloaizap.bsky.social)
item.description: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los futbolistas no podemos hablar de política también es politizar el fútbol. Somos parte de la sociedad. Para criticar el fútbol femenino dicen que ellas no generan lo mismo. Pero Alexia Putellas genera más que yo"
item.content:encoded: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los futbolistas no podemos hablar de política también es politizar el fútbol. Somos parte de la sociedad. Para criticar el fútbol femenino dicen que ellas no generan lo mismo. Pero Alexia Putellas genera más que yo"

item.title: A fantastic day spent photographing the trains at the East L…
item.author: Joshua 🏳‍🌈 (@joshuagrid56098.bsky.social)
item.description: A fantastic day spent photographing the trains at the East Lancs Railway Diesel Gala. D7076 makes a spectacular scene as it powers through Burrs Country Park hauling the freight set on the 1249 Ramsbottom to Bury. (03/07/26)
item.content:encoded: A fantastic day spent photographing the trains at the East Lancs Railway Diesel Gala. D7076 makes a spectacular scene as it powers through Burrs Country Park hauling the freight set on the 1249 Ramsbottom to Bury. (03/07/26)

item.title: Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they …
item.author: Dr. Redfern Jon Barrett (@redfernjon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
item.content:encoded:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!

item.title: NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about h…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about his mental health before he died at Camp East Montana.

Records paint a portrait of how the Texas facility's staff failed to adequately respond.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about his mental health before he died at Camp East Montana.

Records paint a portrait of how the Texas facility's staff failed to adequately respond.

with @texastribune.org

item.title: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When…

item.description: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When trees vanish, species vanish.
item.content:encoded: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When trees vanish, species vanish.

item.title: I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me…
item.author: David Bowman (@dlbowman76.com)
item.description:
I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me "David, I found this at a garage sale. They want $30 for it. What do you think?"

It was a signed, true first-edition of "Salem's Lot" in immaculate condition.
item.content:encoded:
I just made a slightly strangled noise. A relative texted me "David, I found this at a garage sale. They want $30 for it. What do you think?"

It was a signed, true first-edition of "Salem's Lot" in immaculate condition.

item.title: #Poetry #Painting #Morality The good and the evil are happe…
item.author: Art & Nature (@capecodfairytales.bsky.social)
item.description:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet
item.content:encoded:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet
